mission: G6 dry-run only: do not mutate any files. Adapter must accept the contract and exit without launching Cursor when -DryRun is set.
stopCondition: Stop immediately; this contract is for -DryRun verification only.
acknowledgmentProtocol: Emit CURSOR_TASK_ACKNOWLEDGED as first structured line if ever launched (must not launch under -DryRun).
completionProtocol: Emit CURSOR_TASK_COMPLETED only after real work (must not launch under -DryRun).
fallbackPolicy: On any ambiguity stop; do not improvise.
